description: CRIT-800's threshold has TWO parts: (a) regex `^///\s+REQ-IPC-0(0[1-9]|1[0-9]|20)` returns 20 matches, and (b) 'each of REQ-IPC-001..020 is mapped to at least one `prop_ipc_*` test name'. Iter-2 satisfies part (a) — the comment block at editor_wire_sprint8.rs:30-65 mechanically yields 20 lines. But part (b) is FALSE for REQ-IPC-005. The coverage map at line 35 says: `REQ-IPC-005 (Saving exact key set)       — prop_ipc_006_saving (within prop_ipc_006_*)`. No test named `prop_ipc_006_saving` exists in the file. The only `prop_ipc_006_*` test is `prop_ipc_006_switching_key_set_equality` (line 414), which constructs `EditingSessionStateDto::Switching` exclusively — see lines 415-423 (no_blocks variant) and lines 457-465 (with_blocks variant). The Saving variant key set is NEVER asserted by any prop_ipc_006_* test. Furthermore, no other prop_ipc_* test in the file exercises Saving variant key-set equality (key SET assertion via BTreeSet) — prop_ipc_008_blocks_optionality only tests blocks-key behavior on the Editing variant (lines 528, 545, 577), and prop_ipc_010_round_trip_cover_set only round-trips F05/F06 Saving fixtures via serde without asserting the key set. Phase 5 graders will discover REQ-IPC-005 has no asserting test despite the map claiming so, mechanically failing the semantic part of CRIT-800.

evidence.snippet: ///   REQ-IPC-005 (Saving exact key set)       — prop_ipc_006_saving (within prop_ipc_006_*)

remediationOptions: Add a new test `prop_ipc_006_saving_key_set_equality` mirroring prop_ipc_006_switching_key_set_equality but constructing EditingSessionStateDto::Saving { current_note_id, is_note_empty, blocks } and asserting expected_keys = {status, currentNoteId, isNoteEmpty} (and {status, currentNoteId, isNoteEmpty, blocks} for the with-blocks case).
Then update the coverage map line 35 to `prop_ipc_006_saving_key_set_equality` and the cargo test count threshold from 20 to 21.
Alternatively, repoint the map to `prop_ipc_010` (round-trip on F05/F06 Saving fixtures) AND add an explicit key-set assertion inside prop_ipc_010 for Saving fixtures so the mapping becomes truthful.
